title: hypericum × inodorum
intro: Hypericum × inodorum, also known as sweet amber or sweet woodruff, is a hybrid plant species of the genus Hypericum, known for its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to the presence of hyperforin and hypericin compounds. The health benefits of Hypericum × inodorum include its potential in reducing anxiety and depression, improving sleep quality, and treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to utilize its medicinal properties.
